# Reproducer derived from https://github.com/lm-sys/FastChat/issues/2405
# repo: lm-sys/FastChat
# title: pip3 install "fschat[model_worker,webui]" failed  at  Collecting sentencepiece (from fschat[model_worker,webui])   Downloading sentencepiece-0.1.99-cp310-cp310-macosx_11_0_arm64.whl (1.2 MB)

# Last frames in traceback:
#   /opt/homebrew/anaconda3/envs/camel/lib/python3.10/site-packages/pip/_vendor/urllib3/response.py line 527 in _fp_read
#   /opt/homebrew/anaconda3/envs/camel/lib/python3.10/site-packages/pip/_vendor/cachecontrol/filewrapper.py line 90 in read
#   /opt/homebrew/anaconda3/envs/camel/lib/python3.10/http/client.py line 466 in read
#   /opt/homebrew/anaconda3/envs/camel/lib/python3.10/socket.py line 705 in readinto
#   /opt/homebrew/anaconda3/envs/camel/lib/python3.10/ssl.py line 1274 in recv_into
#   /opt/homebrew/anaconda3/envs/camel/lib/python3.10/ssl.py line 1130 in read

# Minimal repro (conceptual):

def repro():
    # Conditions described in the issue:
    # camel) mt@hahaha camel % pip3 install "fschat[model_worker,webui]"
    # Collecting fschat[model_worker,webui]
    # Obtaining dependency information for fschat[model_worker,webui] from https://files.pythonhosted.org/packages/80/f4/4b64f
    # Downloading fschat-0.2.28-py3-none-any.whl.metadata (18 kB)
    # Requirement already satisfied: aiohttp in /opt/homebrew/anaconda3/envs/camel/lib/python3.10/site-packages (from
    raise TimeoutError('reproduce: see https://github.com/lm-sys/FastChat/issues/2405')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    repro()
